note: The official 2025-2026 Handbook publishes the Professional Mode curriculum as 60 units of Major Courses, comprising 24 units of Major Required Courses and 36 units of Major Elective Courses, plus the 6-unit VART4137 Studio Honours Project. Students must complete at least 27 units of Level 3 studio courses. A concentration is established by completing 18 units of Level 3 studio courses and the 6-unit Studio Honours Project in the same division (Studio and Media Arts or Craft and Design); the remaining 9 required Level 3 studio units may be taken in the other practice division. If more than 27 Level 3 studio units are completed, the concentration is determined by the division containing the majority of completed studio units. The published Cluster Elective and Major Elective listings are recorded as official course options, but are not represented as a closed automatic completion path beyond these stated unit and concentration rules. VART2337 is a required 0-unit work experience. The Programme page states that senior-year students from the 2020 intake onwards take VART3446 to exempt VART2306; the linked course page confirms VART3446 is 3 units. The page separately describes a Liberal Arts Mode with 60 units dedicated to Visual Arts, 15 approved units in cognate disciplines and 22 Free Elective units, but does not publish a separate closed coded course table for that mode; this supplement therefore does not fabricate one. University Language Courses, General Education Courses, cognate-discipline choices and Free Electives are excluded. No Year or Term is assigned from narrative progression guidance.
